name: Eshna's Quarters
description:
You step into a musty room, filled with the scent of age and decay.  Whomever
lives in these quarters must have been living here for some time, guessing by
the layers of dust in the corners.  There is a small bed to the northeast, and
a circular table placed in the center of the room, with two chairs.  
Apparently whoever lives here also expects guests to come and visit.
